languages.text: "Без происшествий, Ваша Светлость. Можете не задерживаться".

traits.locale_text: "Без происшествий, Ваша Светлость. Можете не задерживаться".

languages.text: "Nothing out of the ordinary to delay you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
languages.original_text: "Без происшествий, Ваша Светлость. Можете не задерживаться".

traits.locale_text: "Nothing out of the ordinary to prevent you from moving along, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"Nothing out of the ordinary to prevent you from moving along, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"Nothing out of the ordinary to delay you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
"Nothing out of the ordinary to delay you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: “一切正常，不会耽误您的事，大人。”
languages.original_text: "Nothing out of the ordinary to delay you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: “一切正常，不会耽误您的事，大人。”

languages.text: «Nada fuera de lo normal que pueda retrasarl{mf|o|a}, mi{mf|lord|lady}».
languages.original_text: "Nothing out of the ordinary to delay you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: «Nada fuera de lo normal que pueda retrasarl{mf|o|a}, mi{mf|lord|lady}».

languages.text: « Il n'y a rien d'assez notable pour vous retarder, Votre Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: "Nothing out of the ordinary to delay you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: « Il n'y a rien d'assez notable pour vous retarder, Votre Seigneurie. »

languages.text: "Sizi geciktirecek olağan dışı bir durum yok {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: "Nothing out of the ordinary to delay you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: "Sizi geciktirecek olağan dışı bir durum yok {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.original_text: "Nothing out of the ordinary to delay you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: 「あなたを足止めするような変わったことは、何もありません、{mf|閣下|閣下}」
languages.original_text: "Nothing out of the ordinary to delay you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたを足止めするような変わったことは、何もありません、{mf|閣下|閣下}」
